name: Sherry Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a small saucepan.
2. Saute the mushrooms for 2 to 3 minutes until they are golden brown.
3. Sprinkle the flour over the mushrooms and butter, stirring one minute.
4. Add the light cream and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the sauce boils.
5. Stir one tablespoon of the sauce into the beaten egg yolk.
6. Add the egg yolk mixture to the sauce, continuing to cook while stirring until the desired thickness is reached. Do not boil.
7. Season with sherry, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and paprika to taste.
8. If desired, stir in the minced truffle and remove from heat.
